regional_summary_6h.headline: Syrian military restructuring and Iranian internet blackout heighten regional tensions.

Iran's ongoing internet blackout enters its 30th day, exacerbating humanitarian conditions.
Iran's diplomatic outreach to Iraq continues with a message from Mojtaba Khamenei.
